title: The Bioshock Modpack
body:
## The Bioshock Modpack **Bioshock in Minecraft!** Create waterscrapers, U-Invent something and find out the difference between a man and a slave! Would you kindly try it out?
Versions Available mod versions can be found on the [Versions tab](https://modrinth.com/modpack/the-bioshock-modpack/versions).
Mod List On the Versions list, choose a version and go to the dependencies. All the mods for that version are there!
Other ### Version Format **tbsm-mc1.20.1-v1** - tbsm: the name of the pack - mc: the version of minecraft that version works on - v: the version of the mod ### Derivatives The mods in this pack can be used according to their licenses (found in the Mod List above). Any code you use found **only in this modpack** (none of the mods inside of the pack) can be used according to the project's license.
[![Ultraservers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/975b29c3c9453d777f239cad60e4ca56382f2d54_0.webp)](https://ultraservers.com/stovonson)
made by splewsh
